pipeline: nebula.web0.encode_image_web0 — Pillow >= 11.3 (bundled libavif), SSIM from nebula.metrics (luma, BT.709, 11x11 gaussian, crop 5)

sources.description: Kodak kodim23 — parrots; classic photo test, moderate detail
Kodak kodim13 — river rapids; hardest of the set, dense fine detail

notes: Reference run: Windows 10 x64, Python 3.10.11, Pillow 12.2.0 (bundled libavif), 2026-06-10.
Different libavif/aom versions shift output size a few percent at identical quality settings — that is why the size tolerance is ±5%.

SSIM is computed by nebula.metrics.compute_ssim on the BT.709 luma plane (scikit-image-compatible, gaussian 11x11, 5 px border crop) — other SSIM implementations will produce slightly different absolute values.
Ratios are content-dependent: the detailed kodim13 compresses ~2x less than kodim23 at the same setting. Synthetic/flat images compress far more; do not quote these numbers as universal.
